working: ANALYZER ref dropdown — shows library tracks processed by background pipeline
Credits panel below chart (producer/mixer/mastering) when ref selected + credits exist
processLibraryTrackInBackground(): preview URL → Essentia → Demucs EQ curves → Genius credits
Background queue runs on startup (15s delay), 5s gap between tracks
POST /fetch-credits: {title, artist, reference_track_id} → Genius scrape + saves to reference_tracks
saveBrainFile: strips date prefix(es) from title before building filename — stops triple-prefix bug
syncObsidianFile: bare-title fallback lookup prevents duplicate rows from dated files
notes: Background queue only processes tracks with spotify_id and source in (user, agent). Queue will be empty until SQL columns exist AND library tracks have been promoted to My Refs. Genius scraping may fail for non-English tracks or tracks not on Genius.
